description: Year and quarter of sample collection, derived from blood draw date (format: YYYY_Q)
Visit number assigned by matching blood draw date to the closest visit date
Phosphorylated tau 217 (pTau-217) plasma concentration; a high-sensitivity blood-based biomarker for Alzheimer's disease-related tau pathology
Phosphorylated tau 181 (pTau-181) plasma concentration; a biomarker associated with Alzheimer's disease tau pathology (higher missingness than pTau-217)
Amyloid beta 42 (Aβ42) plasma concentration; lower levels are associated with amyloid plaque burden in the brain
Amyloid beta 40 (Aβ40) plasma concentration; used as a reference denominator for the Aβ42/Aβ40 ratio
Aβ42/Aβ40 ratio; composite plasma biomarker of amyloid burden — lower values indicate higher cerebral amyloid deposition
Glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP) plasma concentration; a marker of astrocyte activation and neuroinflammation
Neurofilament light chain (NfL) plasma concentration; a marker of neuro-axonal damage, elevated across multiple neurodegenerative diseases
